You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/nmstate-console-plugin/source/src/views/states/list/components/NNStateEmptyState.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 2 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 10
Rule [family:EmptyState]:
## EmptyState Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <EmptyState headerClassName={...} headingLevel={...} icon={...} isFullHeight={...} status={...} titleClassName={...} titleText={...} variant={...}>
    <EmptyStateBody />
    <EmptyStateFooter />
    <EmptyStateActions />
  </EmptyState>
```

Props that stay on <EmptyState>: headerClassName, headingLevel, icon, isFullHeight, status, titleClassName, titleText, variant

Add imports: EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateFooter, EmptyStateActions from '@patternfly/react-core'

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:
  className -> headerClassName (renamed, type unchanged)
  children -> status (TYPE CHANGED):
    old: React.ReactNode
    new: 'danger' | 'warning' | 'success' | 'info' | 'custom'
New props on replacement:
  isFullHeight: boolean
  variant: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 10: [sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]
    componentName: Title
    module: @patternfly/react-core
    parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
    parentName: EmptyState
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: LlmAssisted
      Component: EmptyState
      Replacement: EmptyStateBody

Code contexts:

   11          {t('No NodeNetworkStates found')}



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 2
Line: 9
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Incident context:
  componentName: EmptyState
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: EmptyState
Prop: titleText
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
    8    return (
    9      <EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.full}>
   10        <Title headingLevel="h5" size="lg">

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/nmstate-console-plugin/source/src/views/states/list/components/NNStateEmptyState.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 10 — `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`)
The rule says that `Title` is used as a direct child of `EmptyState`, but in PF v6, `EmptyState` no longer uses `Title` as a direct child. The title content should be moved to the `titleText` prop on `EmptyState`.

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 9 — `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`)
`EmptyState` has a new `titleText` prop that absorbs content previously passed as children. The `<Title>` child with its text content should be converted to the `titleText` prop.

### Combined Changes:
Both fixes converge on the same transformation:
1. The `<Title headingLevel="h5" size="lg">{t('No NodeNetworkStates found')}</Title>` child should be removed from inside `<EmptyState>`
2. The text content should be moved to `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`
3. The `headingLevel` should be moved to a `headingLevel` prop on `<EmptyState>`
4. `EmptyStateVariant.full` maps to the `variant` prop — in v6, the variant values are string literals (`'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'`), so `EmptyStateVariant.full` should become `"full"` (or we can keep it if `EmptyStateVariant` is still available — but since the migration is to v6, let me check the pattern). The variant prop value `EmptyStateVariant.full` can stay as-is if the enum still exists, but the ground truth shows it's a string union now. Let me use the string `"full"` directly.
5. Remove `Title` and `EmptyStateVariant` from imports (no longer needed)
6. No need to add `EmptyStateBody`, `EmptyStateFooter`, `EmptyStateActions` imports since they aren't being used in this simple component

Let me apply the changes:
Now let me also clean up the unused `React` import — since we're not using JSX that needs `React` in scope with modern JSX transform, but let me check if `FC` still needs it:

The `React` import is still there. Since `React` is no longer directly referenced (no `React.` usage, and JSX transform handles it), but `FC` is still used. The `React` default import isn't needed — only the named `FC` import. However, this depends on the project's JSX transform configuration. Since the original code had `import React, { FC }` and removing the default `React` import is a separate concern from the migration fixes, I'll leave it as-is to make the minimum necessary changes.

The `EmptyState` now has no children, so I can simplify it to a self-closing tag:
Let me verify the final file:
The file looks clean and correct. Let me verify there are no remaining references to removed imports:

No remaining references to `Title` or `EmptyStateVariant` — the cleanup is complete.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 (Line 10 — `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`): ✅ Applied
- Removed the `<Title headingLevel="h5" size="lg">` wrapper from inside `<EmptyState>`.
- Moved the `headingLevel="h5"` prop to `<EmptyState>`.
- Moved the title text content (`t('No NodeNetworkStates found')`) to the new `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`.
- Converted `EmptyState` to a self-closing tag since it no longer has children.
- Removed unused `Title` import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 2 (Line 9 — `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`): ✅ Applied (combined with Fix 1)
- The `titleText` prop was added to `<EmptyState>` with the content previously inside `<Title>`.
- Replaced `EmptyStateVariant.full` enum reference with the string literal `"full"` (v6 uses string union types for variant).
- Removed unused `EmptyStateVariant` import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

No remaining references to `Title` or `EmptyStateVariant` — the cleanup is complete.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 (Line 10 — `sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`): ✅ Applied
- Removed the `<Title headingLevel="h5" size="lg">` wrapper from inside `<EmptyState>`.
- Moved the `headingLevel="h5"` prop to `<EmptyState>`.
- Moved the title text content (`t('No NodeNetworkStates found')`) to the new `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`.
- Converted `EmptyState` to a self-closing tag since it no longer has children.
- Removed unused `Title` import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 2 (Line 9 — `sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext`): ✅ Applied (combined with Fix 1)
- The `titleText` prop was added to `<EmptyState>` with the content previously inside `<Title>`.
- Replaced `EmptyStateVariant.full` enum reference with the string literal `"full"` (v6 uses string union types for variant).
- Removed unused `EmptyStateVariant` import from `@patternfly/react-core`.
